title: Rich Gooey Algerian Tortillas Quesadilla
description: A rich, gooey Algerian-inspired dish featuring katsuramuki-cut tortillas to cure a hangover, low-sodium-friendly. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch option.

ingredients.name: Tortillas
ingredients.notes: Low-sodium tortillas, cut into katsuramuki strips.

ingredients.name: Spiced Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: Low-sodium beef, spiced with cumin, coriander, and paprika.

instructions: Preheat a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 15g of olive oil to the skillet and sauté the katsuramuki-cut tortillas until crispy and golden brown.
Add the spiced ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the caramelized onions, roasted red peppers, cheddar cheese, and feta cheese to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F.
